item.title: Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque & performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors & outrageous acts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-05-08T23:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: www.audaciousnola.com/tickets Tickets: https://PsychedelicSpeakeasyBurlesque.eventbrite.com
Audacious NOLA presents:
PSYCHEDELIC SPEAKEASY!
Immerse yourself in a surreal evening of burlesque and performance art filled with untold delights, vibrant colors, wild sensations and outrageous acts! Each month features a new cast and a new show in the Twilight Room at AllWays Lounge & Cabaret.
Colorful and neon attire is highly encouraged!
-Tipping highly encouraged
Doors 10pm, show 10:30pm
N﻿OTE FOR VIP TICKETS: Group parties reserving VIP tickets *must* purchase as a group under one single name in order to be seated together.
This is a 21+ event, ID required
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
hello@audaciousnola.com
www.audaciousnola.com

item.title: Experience the elegant world of Burlesque...with a TWIST. Champagne and Showgirls are waiting for you at The Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge Starts: 2026-05-09T23:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com Tickets: https://Burlesquewithatwist.eventbrite.com
One of the most beloved Burlesque Shows in New Orleans!
Class: A Classic New Orleans Burlesque Show with a Twist is where you learn the true meaning of "Entertainment!"
Unforgettable, jaw-dropping performances! Dazzling Costumes! Champagne, and Showgirls!
Then after intermission, we turn up the heat, and reveal the twist!
Limited seating!
Get your tickets before they sell out!
Experience the elegant world of Burlesque at the Allways Lounge & Cabaret!
Doors 10pm, Show 10:30pm
Don't forget your dollar bills to throw on stage!!
www.Prettieboi.com for tickets
The Allways Lounge & Cabaret
This is a 21+ event
RSVP REQUIRED
NO REFUNDS
Prettieboishowcase@gmail.com

item.title: The Never Going To Let You Go Tour brings Drew and Ellie back to intimate, connection-driven evenings—melding original storytelling & harmony-rich performances.
item.description:
Venue: The Joy Theater Starts: 2026-05-12T21:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: hive.co/l/drewandellieholcombnola25 Tickets: hive.co/l/drewandellieholcombnola25
Drew Holcomb
There are no strangers at a Drew Holcomb show. For nearly two decades, the award-winning songwriter has turned each performance into a celebration of community, collaboration, and contemporary American roots. Strangers No More, the band’s eighth album, captured this spirit and spun the #1 Americana song, “Find Your People”—a track that was synced in multiple national campaigns, including a Super Bowl commercial for Publix. The Neighbors also showcased their heartfelt connection when they performed live at the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade.
Ellie Holcomb
After an 8-year journey alongside her husband’s band, Ellie Holcomb’s solo debut, As Sure As The Sun, earned her Top 10 radio success and a GMA Dove Award for New Artist of the Year. Her third solo full-length, CANYON, further established her voice with another Top 10 radio single, “I Will Carry You.” A best-selling author, Ellie has moved over 600,000 books, including several children’s titles and a devotional. Her dedication to creative excellence has earned her four GMA Dove Awards to date. Her upcoming studio album, Far Country, releases on September 12th.
Together...
Their first-ever duo album, Memory Bank, became the longest-charting release at Americana radio and was the soundtrack to their sold-out North American tour, further affirming their unique synergy and appeal. The Never Going To Let You Go Tour brings Drew and Ellie back to those intimate, connection-driven evenings—melding original storytelling, harmony-rich performances, and the warmth that has made their music a fixture in fans’ hearts.

item.title: Blue Nile presents Kota Dosa
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-13T20:00:00.000-06:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/
Kota Dosa is a creative music collective known for blending blues, funk, psychedelic rock, and jazz, with roots in New York, New Orleans, and Oregon. Led by brothers Jesse Jake and Cody Luke, the band features powerful vocals, guitar solos, and a notable horn section. They perform original music alongside influential covers and are recognized for their high-energy, genre-bending live shows.

item.title: The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal
item.description:
Venue: Poor Boys Starts: 2026-05-14T17:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Comedy More info: https://www.facebook.com/share/14T5Mey6Nit/ Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gumbolaya-the-magic-mic-tickets-1980178041828?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=listing&utm-source=cp
The magic is in the Gumbo. The bar will supply the booze, Flav and Kasia provide you 7 minutes to show us your stuff. Poets, Musicians, Comedians, Magicians and whatever you can think of within legal limits welcome to bring your flavor! Sometimes there's prizes, sometimes there's positive surprises in the mix. There's always fun! It's free, but buy 2 drinks dammit! Pull up, turn up, laugh and savor the flavor of the authentic New Orleans experience! Sign up at 9 start at 9:30. See less

Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. item.title: Grammy Award-Winning Irvin Mayfield's Music Church
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-14T21:00:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.
A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.

item.title: A monthly spectacle featuring the biggest and best from New Orleans' finest entertainers and special guests from around the world including circus acts, Burlesque Dancers, Magic, and sideshow stunts!
item.description:
Venue: The AllWays Lounge & Cabaret Starts: 2026-05-15T20:00:00.000-05:00 Ends: 2026-05-15T21:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com Tickets: bigdamnshow.eventbrite.com
The Big Damn Show began as a One Night Only event that, by popular demand, is now a monthly revue show. The show is hosted and produced by JuJu and Odd Corey, a magic and sideshow duo specializing in hilariously strange and bizarre magic and dangerous stunts like fire eating and sword swallowing. Every month features multiple special guests ranging from knife throwers to burlesque dancers and drag performers.

item.title: Blue Nile presents Kermit Ruffins and the BBQ Swingers
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-15T21:00:00.000-06:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/kermit-ruffins-the-bbq-swingers-2025/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/kermit-ruffins-the-bbq-swingers-2026/
"WE PARTYIN'!"
Advance Tickets & Reserved Seating bluenilelive.com
Kermit Ruffins needs only two words to hype a New Orleans barroom for one of his weekly shows, and this, his personal slogan, sums up what this Big Easy ambassador is all about.
From playing himself in the HBO Series Treme, to barbecuing outside his bar, Kermit’s Treme Mother-inLaw Lounge, to sitting in with Jon Batiste and Stay Human on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the trumpeter/vocalist keeps himself busy when he isn’t on stage doing what he does best—entertaining and sharing his love of life with the world. He personifies the laid-back vibe of New Orleans.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.

item.title: FREE monthly line dance classes at The Blue Crab! All skill levels welcome. Hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco & NOLA classics. Just bring water & dancing spirit!
item.description:
Venue: The Blue Crab Starts: 2026-05-16T11:00:00.000-04:00 Ends: 2026-05-16T12:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Theater, Stage & Dance More info: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Get your weekend started right with AARP Louisiana's "Movin' and Groovin'" - a free monthly outdoor line dance class at The Blue Crab's scenic lower patio! Perfect for all skill levels, these energetic sessions feature diverse music including hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco, and New Orleans classics. No experience needed - bring comfortable clothes, water, and your dancing spirit! All ages welcome!
Please sign up here: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/
Address: 7900 Lakeshore Dr, New Orleans, LA 70124
Time: 10 am - 11 am
Dates:
-Saturday, September 20
-Saturday, October 18
-Saturday, November 15
-Saturday, December 20
-Third Saturday of the Month

item.title: New Orleans' only event featuring adoptable dogs AND adult entertainment!
item.description:
Venue: The Dog House Starts: 2026-05-16T18:00:00.000-06:00 Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous More info: www.doghousenola.com
Titties and Pitties is a once a month event showcasing both talented New Orleans performers and adoptable dogs from Animal Rescue New Orleans.
Hosted by Laveau Contraire, join us the third Saturday of every month for a night of drag, burlesque, adoptable dogs, specialty cocktails, and a general tail-wagging good time.
2736 Banks Street, New Orleans, LA 70119
Preregister your dog at www.doghousenola.com
All dogs are welcome in our leashed areas. Dogs who wish to enter the park will require a membership.

item.title: Blue Nile presents Big Sam and Friends
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-05-16T21:00:00.000-04:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/big-sam-and-friends-blue-nile/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/big-sam-and-friends-blue-nile/
Blue Nile presents Big Sam & Friends
DOORS 7PM.
All Shows Ages 21+. Valid I.D. Required Upon Entry.
Advance tickets $15
Reserved Seating $25
*Please note that reserved seating is family-style. You may purchase all tickets at your table for a more intimate experience.
VIP Area $400, Available as upgrade to your General Admission ticket.
Our VIP area includes booth seating for 6 and up to 8 with additional chairs. Direct access to Bar and beverage services. Includes one Bottle plus mixers. Equivalent beverage option can be arranged. Bottled water and sodas are complimentary. VIP Bottle Service Menu can be found here. To better serve you and your party please email bottle & mixer preferences prior to arrival to: info@bluenilelive.com
Ability to rope off for additional privacy for your party.
"The Nook" Area $100
"The Nook" features booth seating accommodating up to four guests. Full area reservation is required.
